mapper.select: /* 문서 상세 조회 repository.selectDetailByDocId */ SELECT A.DOC_ID , A.DOC_TITLE , A.CATEGORY_ID , A.AUTHOR , A.SEC_LVL , A.CONTENT , A.KEYWORDS , A.REF_URL , A.USE_YN , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_DS_DOC B INNER JOIN TB_DS C ON C.DATASET_ID = B.DATASET_ID WHERE 1=1 AND B.DOC_ID = A.DOC_ID AND C.DATASET_BUILD_STATUS_CD = '003' AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' ) AS DS_DOC_CNT FROM TB_DOC A WHERE A.DOC_ID = #{docId}

/* 문서별 파일 목록 조회 repository.selectDocFileListByDocId */ SELECT A.DOC_FILE_ID , A.DOC_ID , A.FILE_NAME , A.FILE_PATH , A.FILE_SIZE , A.FILE_TYPE , A.FILE_ORD , A.USE_YN , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_DOC_FILE A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.DOC_ID = #{docId} ORDER BY A.DOC_FILE_ID, A.FILE_ORD
mapper.insert: /* 카테고리 저장(등록) repository.saveCategory - CAT_LVL 자동 계산: 루트(부모 없음)=1, 자식=부모 CAT_LVL + 1 - 부모 ID가 전달되었는데 부모가 없으면 INSERT 하지 않음 */ INSERT INTO TB_CONTENT_CAT ( CATEGORY_ID , CATEGORY_NAME , PARN_CAT_ID , CAT_LVL , SORT_ORD , CREATE_DT ) SELECT V.CATEGORY_ID , V.CATEGORY_NAME , V.PARN_CAT_ID , CASE WHEN V.PARN_CAT_ID IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE P.CAT_LVL + 1 END , V.SORT_ORD , NOW() FROM ( SELECT #{categoryId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS CATEGORY_ID , #{categoryName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS CATEGORY_NAME , NULLIF(#{parnCatId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '') AS PARN_CAT_ID , COALESCE(#{sortOrd, jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0) AS SORT_ORD ) V LEFT JOIN TB_CONTENT_CAT P ON P.CATEGORY_ID = V.PARN_CAT_ID WHERE V.PARN_CAT_ID IS NULL OR P.CATEGORY_ID IS NOT NULL
